info.title: Markdown Link Checker
info.description: A .NET tool to check the validity of file and URL links in Markdown documents.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet],
m[inimal], n[ormal] (default) and [d]etailed.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
The directory to operate on. Any relative file or directory
paths specified in other options will be relative to this
directory. If not specified, the working directory is used.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
A list of relative Markdown file paths to exclude from
checking.

options.name: --files
options.description:
A list of relative Markdown file paths to checking. All
Markdown files are checked if empty.

options.name: --mode
options.description:
Which links to check. Allowed values are f[iles], u[rls]
and a[ll] (default).
